name: Herman Sourdough Biscuits
recipeIngredient: 5 tablespoons Oil or grease (lard, bacon fat)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 450°F.
2. Mix flour, baking powder, and baking soda in a bowl.
3. Add the Herman Starter and oil, then knead for 10 turns on a floured surface.
4. Roll out to a thickness of 3/4 inch.
5. Cut into rounds and place them on a baking sheet.
6. Bake at 450°F for 10 minutes.
Makes 8 to 12 biscuits.
